variants.tagline: Timeless Tone. Modern Soul. Pure Yosuki.
variants.creative_direction: Midnight-black body drinks in golden-hour warmth as raking light traces wood grain beneath the finish. Amber haze fills a hushed studio. Shadow and glow meet in perfect tension—evoking mastery earned, not given.
variants.scene_direction: warm studio, golden hour light raking across wood grain textures, rich amber tones

variants.tagline: Timeless Tone. Modern Soul. Pure Yosuki.
variants.creative_direction: Warm studio at golden hour. Raking amber light cuts across raw wood grain, casting long shadows. The YG-100's ocean-blue finish glows cool against the warm tones—a deliberate, striking contrast that signals precision meeting soul.
variants.scene_direction: warm studio, golden hour light raking across wood grain textures, rich amber tones

variants.tagline: Built for the Stage. Born for the Moment.
variants.creative_direction: Midnight-black YG-200 Pro caught in a single dramatic backlight at stage edge. Haze diffuses golden beams around the body's gloss finish. Crowd dissolves into bokeh warmth behind. High-contrast, cinematic, reverential.
variants.scene_direction: concert venue edge-of-stage, dramatic backlight, haze in the air, crowd blur in distance

variants.tagline: Built for the Stage. Born for the Moment.
variants.creative_direction: Edge-of-stage, dramatic backlight cuts through rolling haze, casting the ocean-blue YG-200 Pro in deep teal and gold. Crowd dissolves into bokeh. Composition low-angle, reverent. Mood: electric anticipation.
variants.scene_direction: concert venue edge-of-stage, dramatic backlight, haze in the air, crowd blur in distance

variants.tagline: Where Precision Becomes Passion.
variants.cta: Play the YG-300. Feel the Difference.
variants.creative_direction: Shoot the midnight-black YG-300 against a near-black void, raking side light carving dramatic shadows across its contours. A single warm beam catches the fretboard, evoking quiet intensity. Cinematic, still, breathless.
variants.scene_direction: dimly lit studio, dramatic raking side light, deep shadows, near-black background, cinematic

variants.tagline: Where Precision Meets Passion.
variants.cta: Play the YG-300. Own the Stage.
variants.creative_direction: Dimly lit studio, dramatic raking side light carves the ocean-blue finish into deep teal shadows and bright crests. Near-black background dissolves the edges. The guitar floats, luminous—a cinematic still of restrained power and beauty.
variants.scene_direction: dimly lit studio, dramatic raking side light, deep shadows, near-black background, cinematic

variants.tagline: Where every note finds its soul.
variants.creative_direction: The ebony YP-100 anchors a dim studio, its mirror-black finish dissolving into the dark polished floor below. A single soft overhead spot crowns the keys in warm gold. Silence feels alive here.
variants.scene_direction: intimate recording studio, soft overhead spotlight, dark polished floor reflection, quiet warmth

variants.tagline: The Sound of Mastery Lives Here.
variants.creative_direction: Candlelit recital room, warm amber glow on dark wood panelling. The YP-200's ebony finish reflects flickering light. Deep burgundy drapes frame the scene. Gold accents gleam softly. Low camera angle elevates the piano as the room's commanding centerpiece.
variants.scene_direction: elegant recital room, candlelight warmth, dark wood panelling, deep burgundy and gold tones

variants.tagline: Crafted for the World Stage.
variants.creative_direction: A lone ebony YP-300 commands an empty concert stage beneath a single dramatic overhead spotlight. Vast shadow swallows the auditorium behind it, amplifying silence and anticipation. Deep blacks mirror the piano's flawless finish — power held in stillness.
variants.scene_direction: grand concert hall, dramatic overhead spotlight on empty stage, vast dark auditorium receding into shadow

variants.tagline: Every Note Has a Soul. Let Yours Speak.
variants.creative_direction: Bathe the gold-lacquer YS-100 in a smoky amber spotlight against dark exposed brick. Let warm golden haze curl around the bell, mirroring the finish. Deep shadows frame the scene, evoking a late-night jazz club alive with quiet intensity.
variants.scene_direction: late night jazz club, smoky amber spotlight, dark brick wall background, warm golden haze
